'''Tarlo Ganar''' was a [[Khil]] tactician.

==Biography==

A former comrade of [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrian]] [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Quaal Tavier Catharius]], he also led [[Belnar Sector Force]] to victory against their inter-system nemesis, the [[Peltsic League]].<ref name="AIR" />

Due to his age, Ganar faced mandatory retirement. Not being appealed by it, Ganar joined Catharius, who had became the leader of [[m'Yalfor'ac Order]] in his native [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]]. Ganar joined the Order as one of the four-member leading committee, and also one of the two only non-Bitthævrians in the Order. Although he had shown his value to the order, Bitthævrian population did not completely trust him as of [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]<ref name="AIR" />
